calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Patricia J. VanSteenberge.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Allstate Insurance Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY and against the defendant: ART CONSTRUCTION & ROOFING INC. A CORPORATION
Damages of $93,228.76
Prejudgment interest $5,982.18
Costs of $275.62
For the total of $99,486.56.

Judgment signed in open court.
